steps.title: Substitute $x=0$
steps.content: The function is $g(x)=-x+8$. Evaluate it at $0$: $$g(0)=-(0)+8.$$

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice D is correct. Choice B is the input value, not the output. Choice A uses the wrong sign, and choice C is not produced by substituting $0$.
